title: Just Annoying
description: A mod made to make Minecraft just a little bit annoying to give yourself more of a challenge.
body:
## Just Annoying
This mod makes the game _Just Annoying_ enough to make it harder but still feel mostly vanilla.
### Features
- Are you sure? before placing or breaking a block (inspired by [a Knarfy video](https://youtu.be/XAgnogeGY7M?t=90))
- MORNING SACRIFICE TO THE MOBS
- Lightning has a chance to strike pigs or creepers when they spawn, turning them into piglins/charged creepers
- Just so you know now, you cannot have netherite scraps/ingots in your inventory so netherite tools can only be obtained with cheats or crazy redstone machines
- Tamed mobs despawn and leashed mobs take damage
- Phantoms spawn above you at nighttime
- Mobs can break doors next to them
- When right clicking a block, it may explode
And these are just some of the features, with more to come!
### Warning
This mod may make the game unfun, unplayable, and/or annoying.
This mod may annoy you in chat with annoying messages.
This mod may make the game harder to beat and/or speedrun.
This mod despawns villagers and iron golems when interacted or damaged.
### Thank you!
## Made using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)
